task_completion.description: Verify that Wondershare EdrawMax is opened with a new or active canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application window is visible with a workspace/canvas ready for editing.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required title is added to the infographic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Remote Work Impact 2024' is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey data is visualized in a chart or graphic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart (e.g., pie chart, bar chart) or data visualization is visible on the canvas containing the values 45, 35, and 20 (with or without % signs).

task_completion.description: Verify that the key insight text is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Flexibility is the top driver of productivity' (or 'Flexibility is the top driver') is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that a relevant icon is included in the infographic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An icon of a computer, home, or person is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the editable file is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window shows the file being saved as 'remote_work_infographic.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the infographic is exported as an image to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file manager window shows the file being saved/exported as 'remote_work_infographic.png' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the infographic.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and canvas elements rather than using a terminal to generate the file via scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the chart was created using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears to be an editable EdrawMax element (e.g., showing selection handles or chart data entry panels) rather than a pre-made image pasted from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the PNG was exported using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax 'Export' or 'Save As' (to PNG) dialog is visible, proving the application generated the image, rather than the agent just taking a system screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.eddx. Expected PNG path: /home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.png. Required text on canvas: 'Remote Work Impact 2024' and 'Flexibility is the top driver'. Required data values in the chart: 45, 35, and 20.
